other_observers: Christine Happ, Cole Wild, Andrew Spencer, Bill Miller, Beth Dillon, Ron Harden, Gary Lefko; I am the original finder and identifier
specific_location: College Lake on C.S.U. Foothills campus
description: Small short-necked goose similar in size to accompanying "Richardson's" Cackling Geese (Branta hutchinsii hutchinsii); Black head, neck breast, with a white mark on the side of the neck. Stubby black bill, similar in shape to bill of Cackling Goose. Dark brownish-gray sides with several whitish vertical streaks. Bright white lower flanks, vent and undertail coverts. Dark gray brown back and wings.Behaviors: Swimming on a lake alongside Cackling Geese.Call: not heardPlumage: adult
